nav.active_state_desc: Always visually indicate which tab or menu item is currently active.
nav.anchor_desc: Shortcuts to specific sections on long pages.
nav.breadcrumb_desc: Understand current location and quickly return to parent categories.
nav.burger_desc: Mobile aggregation for many menu items.
nav.context_switch_desc: Best for switching views within the same context.
nav.fixed_pos_desc: Fix navigation positions so they don't move between pages.
nav.guide_desc: Choose ways for users to move within apps, content, or switch views.
nav.pagination_desc: Moving through pages of large datasets.

navutil.affix_desc: Pins sidebars or buttons at specific positions even during scrolling.
navutil.affix_usage_note: Use `Affix` to prevent important navigation from disappearing during scroll.
navutil.backtop_desc: Allows one-click scrolling to the top on long pages.
navutil.backtop_usage_note: Consider providing `BackTop` for pages requiring 3+ scrolls.
navutil.floatbtn_desc: Sticky buttons (e.g., bottom right) for prompts or inquiries.
navutil.floatbtn_usage_note: `FloatButton` is highly attention-grabbing; limit its use to avoid clutter.
navutil.guide_desc: Supplementary navigation elements that follow scrolls or jump instantly.
